title: Noninvasive photoacoustic computed mesoscopy for longitudinal brain imaging
authors: Shijie Ruan; Wei Qin; Linyang Li; Tingting Li; et al.
summary_cn: 2026 年 Science Advances 光声 computed mesoscopy，用于非侵入纵向脑成像。
why_include_cn: 目前库中最新的 Science family 光声成像论文之一。
download_note: Science Advances/PMC open record available.

title: Acoustic Reliefs
authors: Jeremy Chew; Michal Piovarči; Kangrui Xue; Doug L. James; Bernd Bickel
summary_cn: 面向室内声学扩散器的计算设计，强调几何 relief 对声散射的控制。
why_include_cn: 不是成像论文，但属于 ACM TOG 最新声学计算设计/声学编码表面方向，可作为声学编码结构参考。
download_note: Author/preprint PDF from ETH CDL available.

title: Photoacoustic microscopy with meta-optics
authors: Dorian S. H. Brandmüller; David Grafinger; Robert Nuster; Andreas Hohenau; Marcus Ossiander; Peter Banzer
summary_cn: 用 meta-optics/metalens 替代或改造光声显微镜激发光路，探索更紧凑/多功能的光声显微系统。
why_include_cn: Communications Physics 2025 最新光声显微 + 编码光学硬件方向。
download_note: arXiv PDF available; Nature page is the version of record.

title: Ultrasound synthetic aperture non-line-of-sight imaging
authors: Tailin Li; Ilya Starshynov; Khaled Kassem; Zongliang Xie; Ge Ren; Yihan Luo; Daniele Faccio
summary_cn: 利用超声/空气声学合成孔径实现非视域三维隐藏场景成像，是声学 NLOS 与合成孔径成像方向的最新 Nature Portfolio 代表作。
why_include_cn: 该论文与声学非视域成像、超声合成孔径和隐藏场景三维重建方向直接相关，并提供开放获取 PDF。
download_note: Open-access author/institutional PDF available.

title: Z-Splat: Z-Axis Gaussian Splatting for Camera-Sonar Fusion
authors: Ziyuan Qu; Omkar Vengurlekar; Mohamad Qadri; Kevin Zhang; Michael Kaess; Christopher Metzler; Suren Jayasuriya; Adithya Pediredla
venue: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
summary_cn: 将 3D Gaussian Splatting 扩展到相机-声呐融合，用声呐 transient/depth 信息缓解受限视角导致的 depth-axis missing cone 问题。
why_include_cn: TPAMI 2025，且与 AONeuS 同一问题族，适合重点跟踪。
download_note: arXiv PDF available; IEEE Xplore is the version of record.

title: A fast all-optical 3D photoacoustic scanner for clinical vascular imaging
authors: Nam Trung Huynh; Edward Zhang; O. Francies; F. Kuklis; T. Allen; J. Zhu; et al.
summary_cn: 全光学三维光声扫描仪，用于临床血管成像，强调快速三维采集与光学超声探测。
why_include_cn: Nature 子刊中高影响力的光声/声光医学成像系统。
download_note: Nature page indicates open article; PDF URL included.

title: AONeuS: A Neural Rendering Framework for Acoustic-Optical Sensor Fusion
authors: Mohamad Qadri; Kevin Zhang; Akshay Hinduja; Michael Kaess; Adithya Pediredla; Christopher A. Metzler
summary_cn: 面向水下受限基线 3D 重建，将 RGB 与 imaging sonar 的互补信息放入物理神经渲染框架。
why_include_cn: 最直接的“声光融合成像”顶会论文之一。
download_note: arXiv PDF available; ACM version is the version of record.

title: Temporal acoustic point holography
authors: Giorgos Christopoulos; Lei Gao; Diego Martínez Plasencia; Marta Betcke; Ryuji Hirayama; Sriram Subramanian
summary_cn: 声学相控阵点全息的时间编码/时间控制方法，属于 SIGGRAPH 声学全息与声场控制主线。
why_include_cn: 顶会声学编码/声场计算代表作。
download_note: ACM PDF may be open for SIGGRAPH paper; if access fails, keep DOI link.

title: Photoacoustic Tomography with Temporal Encoding Reconstruction (PATTERN) for cross-modal individual analysis of the whole brain
authors: Y. Chen et al.
summary_cn: 提出 PATTERN 平台，用时间编码重建进行非破坏、高速三维全脑光声成像与跨模态个体分析。
why_include_cn: Nature Communications 的编码光声层析成像，属于声光融合成像核心延展方向。
download_note: Nature Communications open-access PDF URL included.

title: Acoustic hologram-induced virtual in vivo enhanced waveguide for transcranial photoacoustic imaging of brains
authors: Lin et al.
summary_cn: 利用声学全息产生特定三维声场，构造 virtual enhanced waveguide 来增强经颅光声成像。
why_include_cn: 典型声-光/光声融合：用声场编码改善光声成像。
download_note: Science Advances open-access PDF should be downloadable.

title: Four-dimensional computational ultrasound imaging of brain hemodynamics
authors: Michael D. Brown; Bastian S. Generowicz; Stephanie Dijkhuizen; Sebastiaan K. E. Koekkoek; Christos Strydis; Johannes G. Bosch; Petros Arvanitis; Geert Springeling; Geert J. T. Leus; Chris I. De Zeeuw; Pieter Kruizinga
summary_cn: 用复杂超声场 + 物理波预测模型降低采样约束，实现小鼠脑血流动力学四维成像。
why_include_cn: 声学编码成像/计算超声成像的 Science Advances 代表作。
download_note: Science Advances/PMC open record available.

title: Neural Volumetric Reconstruction for Coherent Synthetic Aperture Sonar
authors: Albert W. Reed; Juhyeon Kim; Thomas Blanford; Adithya Pediredla; Daniel C. Brown; Suren Jayasuriya
summary_cn: 把神经渲染/analysis-by-synthesis 用于相干合成孔径声呐重建，融合物理约束与场景先验。
why_include_cn: 声学编码/相干声呐成像与神经表示结合的 SIGGRAPH/TOG 核心论文。
download_note: arXiv PDF available; project page reports code/data availability.

title: Seeing With Sound: Long-range Acoustic Beamforming for Multimodal Scene Understanding
authors: Praneeth Chakravarthula et al.
venue: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
summary_cn: 用远距离声学 beamforming 辅助多模态场景理解，展示声学信号在低光和遮挡/NLOS 情况下对视觉的互补性。
why_include_cn: 不是成像重建核心，但属于 CVPR 中“声 + 视觉融合感知”的高相关论文。
download_note: CVF open-access PDF available.

title: High-speed acoustic holography with arbitrary scattering objects
authors: Ryuji Hirayama; Giorgos Christopoulos; Diego Martinez Plasencia; Sriram Subramanian
summary_cn: 考虑任意散射物体存在时的高速声学全息计算，使声场/悬浮显示在复杂边界下仍可工作。
why_include_cn: Science Advances 声学全息代表作，和声学编码/声场控制强相关。
download_note: Science Advances article is open access; PDF URL should download where available.

title: Silicon-photonics acoustic detector for optoacoustic micro-tomography
authors: Yoav Hazan; Ahiad Levi; Michael Nagli; Amir Rosenthal
summary_cn: 提出小型硅光声学探测器并用于活体 optoacoustic micro-tomography。
why_include_cn: Nature Communications 中集成声学探测与光声层析结合的代表。
download_note: Nature Communications open-access PDF URL included.

title: Learning the Geometry of Wave-Based Imaging
authors: K. Kothari et al.
summary_cn: NeurIPS 中面向波动成像几何的学习方法，应用包括 photoacoustic tomography 与 reflection seismology。
why_include_cn: 不是最新，但覆盖 NeurIPS 与波动/光声成像交叉。
download_note: NeurIPS proceedings PDF available.

title: GS-PAT: High-Speed Multi-Point Sound-Fields for Phased Arrays of Transducers
authors: Diego Martinez Plasencia; Ryuji Hirayama; Roberto Montano-Murillo; Sriram Subramanian
summary_cn: 用于相控阵换能器多点声场快速相位检索的 GPU 算法，是后续声学全息/空中触觉/声场编码的重要基础。
why_include_cn: ACM TOG/SIGGRAPH 经典声学编码算法。
download_note: UCL accepted manuscript PDF available.

title: Deep tissue space-gated microscopy via acousto-optic interaction
authors: M. Jang et al.
summary_cn: 通过高频超声焦点调制与 space gating 抑制多重散射，从而提升深组织光学显微成像。
why_include_cn: 典型声光相互作用辅助光学显微。
download_note: Nature Communications open-access PDF URL included.

title: Acousto optic imaging beyond the acoustic diffraction limit using speckle decorrelation
authors: Daniel Doktofsky; Moriya Rosenfeld; Ori Katz
summary_cn: 利用 speckle decorrelation 实现超过声学衍射极限的声光成像。
why_include_cn: 声光成像（AOI）物理机制与超分辨方向的重要 Nature Portfolio 论文。
download_note: Communications Physics open-access PDF URL included.

title: A volumetric display for visual, tactile and audio presentation using acoustic trapping
authors: Ryuji Hirayama; Diego Martinez Plasencia; Nobuyuki Masuda; Sriram Subramanian
summary_cn: 通过声学俘获实现视觉、触觉和声音一体的体显示，是声场控制和声光/多感官展示的 Nature 代表作。
why_include_cn: 不是传统成像重建，但对声学编码显示和声场控制很重要。
download_note: Nature page and Sussex Figshare record available; no direct PDF link recorded here.

title: Acoustic Non-Line-Of-Sight Imaging
authors: David B. Lindell; Gordon Wetzstein; Vladlen Koltun
venue: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
summary_cn: CVPR 2019 声学非视域成像奠基论文，用低成本声学硬件捕获隐藏三维几何。
why_include_cn: 虽然不是最新，但几乎是声学 NLOS 必收基础文献。
download_note: CVF open-access PDF available.
